title: SS Germanic
summary:
SS Germanic is the name of the following ships:

SS Germanic (1874), scrapped in 1950
SS Germanic (1881), wrecked November 1904 near Stag Island in the St. Clair River
SS Germanic (1899), burned 30 March 1917 near her port Collingwood, Ontario
SS Germanic (1936), sunk by U-48 on 29 March 1941
text:
SS Germanic is the name of the following ships:

SS Germanic (1874), scrapped in 1950
SS Germanic (1881), wrecked November 1904 near Stag Island in the St. Clair River
SS Germanic (1899), burned 30 March 1917 near her port Collingwood, Ontario
SS Germanic (1936), sunk by U-48 on 29 March 1941
